privileged_info_summary: The task creates an AP invoice for GardenWorld in iDempiere. The expected grand total of $750.00 is mathematically correct based on two line items: 25 units of a product at $10.00 each ($250.00) plus 10 units of another product at $50.00 each ($500.00). The invoice is expected to be completed (DocStatus='CO') with the specified vendor and line items recorded in the iDempiere database tables c_invoice, c_invoiceline, c_bpartner, and m_product.
